headline: ₹50-200 Cr at risk if disclosure issues persist and trigger fund outflows at stake — Yes Bank's Q3 update and target price cut highlight governance disclosure gaps, raising investor scrutiny
what_matters: BRSR, GRI, DJSI, ESRS frameworks triggered; no imminent regulatory penalty.
Potential for slight P/E compression if ESG ratings deteriorate; no immediate margin erosion.
Marginal increase in cost of capital; possible passive fund outflow but not material at current scale.
